const LIFF_ID = "2009551865-w1GySXcD"; const ADD_FRIEND_URL = "https://line.me/R/ti/p/@209sgiku"; async function checkFriend() { const gate = document.getElementById("gate"); const gateCard = document.getElementById("gateCard"); const root = document.getElementById("root"); try { gateCard.innerHTML = "LIFF 初始化中…"; await liff.init({ liffId: LIFF_ID, withLoginOnExternalBrowser: true }); // 如果是 404 接回來的網址，清掉 hash，回到正常首頁 if (location.hash.startsWith("#/liff-redirect")) { history.replaceState(null, "", "/lottery-site-1/"); } const inClient = liff.isInClient(); const loggedIn = liff.isLoggedIn(); if (!loggedIn) { gateCard.innerHTML = `
尚未登入 LIFF
請直接從 LINE 內重新開啟這個 LIFF 連結。
isInClient: ${inClient} isLoggedIn: ${loggedIn} url: ${location.href}
`; return; } const friendship = await liff.getFriendship(); if (!friendship.friendFlag) { gateCard.innerHTML = `
請先加入好友
加入官方好友後，才可以進行抽獎。
加入好友 `; return; } gate.style.display = "none"; root.style.display = "block"; } catch (err) { gateCard.innerHTML = `
LIFF 載入失敗
message: ${err?.message || "無"} name: ${err?.name || "無"} url: ${location.href}
`; } } window.addEventListener("load", checkFriend);
